What Makes This One Special

⚡
Factory Performance Package
Red brake calipers, lowered sport suspension, and 21" Uberturbine wheels in gloss black. The full Performance treatment, straight from the factory.
🤍
White Vegan Leather Interior
Stunning white interior in excellent condition — bright, clean, and a sharp contrast against the Deep Blue exterior.
🌉
Bay Area Car, Well Loved
This car has seen the Bay in style. No harsh winters, no rust, no drama — just California miles on a well-maintained EV.
🛣️
HOV Lane Access
Active California Clean Air Vehicle sticker — solo carpool lane access across the Bay Area and beyond.
🤖
Full Autopilot Suite
Autosteer, Traffic-Aware Cruise Control, Auto Lane Change, and Navigate on Autopilot included.
📦
Massive Cargo Space
76 cu ft with rear seats folded. Frunk up front, huge powered liftgate in the back — more space than most sedans and hatchbacks.
🏠
No Dealer, No Fees
Direct private party sale. Motivated seller relocating — no doc fees, no markup, no games.
📱
Over-the-Air Updates
Tesla keeps improving this car via OTA software — new features, improved performance, and bug fixes without a service visit.
